@author:
[WIP] Use 3.11.3 first to see whether CI can catch this error
results.test_code:
# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
def test_release_win_min_supported_protobuf_version_is_updated__a1():
    source = open('/workspace/.github/workflows/release_win.yml', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    step_name = 'Verify ONNX with the minimum supported protobuf (from requirements.txt)'
    assert step_name in source, f"Expected the Windows release workflow to include the step '{step_name}', but it was not found."

def test_release_win_min_supported_protobuf_version_is_updated__a2():
    source = open('/workspace/.github/workflows/release_win.yml', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    step_name = 'Verify ONNX with the minimum supported protobuf (from requirements.txt)'
    assert 'python -m pip install protobuf==3.11.3' not in source, "Workflow still pins protobuf==3.11.3 for the 'minimum supported protobuf' verification. The review comment requested updating this (e.g., to 3.12.2)."
